finding_results.notes: Revoiced each warning beat into distinct character domains: Mrs Bhatti now frames risk as account and credit exposure; Peggy speaks in pub-floor containment and service-control terms; Noreen shifts to clipped domestic directives with slangy urgency and interruption-like momentum.
finding_results.summary: Dialogue warnings now carry non-interchangeable idiolect signatures under pressure while preserving scene stakes and continuity.
